Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sophia Menjivar, via zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges Petitioner's recent filing which clears the issues as noted by the Examiner. The court then summarizes and confirms with the Petitioner some of the more important responsibilities that the court expects if she is appointed, including, but not limited to, opening a separate estate account, keeping assets segregated and fully insured, pay valid creditors, and not making any distributions unless ordered by the court. After additional discussion, the court confirms that no one is appearing to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-21-2021 is admitted to probate. Sophia Menjivar is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Aug-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-17-2023 at 9:00 am, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.
